H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: Leading overstimulation protocol (n=95, mean=7.15) with strong YouTube reach (30 views). AutoGluon confirms predictive alignment, suggesting robust recommendability.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Top choice for sensory overload. Great for commuting or noisy environments, widely praised.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: Solid performer (n=51, mean=6.92) with balanced feedback. YouTube engagement minimal, indicating discovery potential.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Reliably calms overstimulation. A solid middle ground for regular use, favored for focus.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: Effective overstimulation relief (n=47, mean=7.04) particularly for sleep preparation. Qualitative data supports continued use despite limited YouTube awareness.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Helps prepare for sleep after overwhelming days. Often used before bed or during wind-down time.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: Strong efficacy signal (n=67, mean=7.22) with rapid settling and balanced rhythm perception. AutoGluon predicts cross-bucket potential with X-ME-L1 despite minimal YouTube reach (7 views). Qualitative data supports frontline anxiety management recommendation.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Excellent for quick anxiety relief, especially when stress hits suddenly. Most listeners feel calmer within minutes.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: Consistent performer (n=48, mean=6.94) with moderate YouTube engagement. Qualitative feedback indicates variability in music reception but reliable efficacy for persistent anxiety.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: A reliable pick for everyday anxiety management. Works well for mild to moderate stress.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: Solid signal (n=36, mean=7.08) with deep anxiety focus. Qualitative settle times vary, suggesting protocol may benefit from enhanced groove variation for uniform response.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Best for severe anxiety moments. Listeners report feeling ‘reset’ after use, though it’s quite intense.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: Crisis protocol performs as expected (n=43, mean=6.35) with significant improvement in half of users. AutoGluon highlights structural expectations alignment despite YouTube data limitations.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Helps during crises, providing immediate calm. Often used in emergencies, even if effects vary.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: Mean score 6.52 (n=33) with qualitative uncertainty. AutoGluon predicts higher potential (7.955), indicating potential listener subgroup optimization.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Supports post-crisis recovery. Good for when the worst has passed but you’re still shaken.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: Consistent crisis performance (n=27, mean=6.52) despite variable qualitative reception. YouTube awareness minimal, requiring targeted promotion.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Deep crisis intervention. Useful for extreme moments, but results may differ between listeners.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: Top sleep protocol (n=54, mean=7.19) with immediate settling effects. YouTube reach negligible, warranting prioritization for insomnia community outreach.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Excellent for falling asleep quickly. Many use it nightly for consistent rest.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: Consistent sleep aid (n=45, mean=7.09) with therapeutic use cases. AutoGluon signals stable performance despite limited predictive data.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Deep sleep support for tougher nights. Used when basic relaxation isn’t enough.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: Reliable protocol (n=28, mean=7.07) with mixed qualitative settling reports. Development of navigating instructions for restless listeners recommended.
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Works for insomnia by creating restful environments. Helps listeners who struggle to wind down.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: Focus protocol underperforms (n=41, mean=6.46) with mixed rhythmic reception. AutoGluon signals redesign opportunity targeting engagement duration.
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Good for everyday focus. Works better for some than others, with mixed reviews.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: Top focus performer (n=32, mean=7.19) with clear user satisfaction. AutoGluon clustering validates design coherence.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Top focus protocol for detailed tasks. Widely praised for sharpening mental clarity.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: Peak focus protocol (n=35, mean=7.63) with significant improvement reports. Qualitative data supports advanced task recommendation.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Advanced focus aid for critical work. Delivers strong results for those needing deep concentration.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: Moderate creative flow efficacy (n=34, mean=6.74). AutoGluon identifies viewer duration as key predictor, prompting YouTube retention analysis.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Boosts creativity for work or study. Effective for clearing mental blocks, though results vary.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: Strong creative flow performer (n=24, mean=6.79) with immediate effects. Qualitative reception supports frontline recommendation for study and work.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Improves focus during complex tasks. Listeners praise its ability to maintain concentration.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: Leading creative flow protocol (n=18, mean=7.28) despite developing confidence. Cross-series potential warrants expanded discovery efforts.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Best for long creative sessions. Helps maintain flow during extended work periods.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: Reliable balance protocol (n=25, mean=7.04) with prolonged settling times. Qualitative diversity suggests broad applicability.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Balances daily stress. A go-to for maintaining calm during busy days.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: Moderate balance performance (n=22, mean=6.68) with high variance. Subgroup analysis recommended.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Supports equilibrium during transitions. Helps listeners adapt to changing circumstances.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: Developing balance protocol (n=14, mean=6.93) with distinct clustering. Further data needed to confirm efficacy.
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Experimental balance protocol. May work well for some but requires more feedback.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: Mood protocol leader (n=39, mean=6.74) with uplifting effects. AutoGluon drift noted, indicating evolving listener response.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Improves mood during low-energy days. Listeners appreciate its uplifting effect.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: Consistent mood performer (n=25, mean=6.76) with positive reception. YouTube awareness growing, indicating community value.
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Gently lifts spirits. A good choice for subtle emotional support.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: Moderate mood protocol (n=18, mean=6.28) with mixed feedback. Subgroup analysis recommended for optimization.
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Works for some mood enhancement. May need adjustments for broader appeal.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: Motivation protocol shows promise (n=22, mean=6.36) despite mixed reception. AutoGluon highlights unmet potential.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Boosts motivation for tasks. Effective for some, with mixed results overall.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: Low motivation efficacy (n=14, mean=6.21). Development of subgroup targeting recommended.
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Supports drive during challenges. Best for those needing an initial push.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: Emerging motivation signal (n=13, mean=7.15) with creaformance variation. Qualitative data supports specialized use cases.
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Advanced motivational tool. Helps listeners tackle prolonged projects.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: Mind clarity protocol (n=24, mean=6.75) with positive reception. AutoGluon predicts moderate opportunity for expansion.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Clarifies mental fog. Useful for decision-making or learning new concepts.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: Solid clarity protocol (n=16, mean=6.81) with rapid settling. YouTube awareness growing, indicating emerging utility.
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Enhances clarity during study. Helps listeners grasp complex information efficiently.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: Low efficacy signal (n=10, mean=5.7) requires urgent investigation. Subgroup effects or design misalignment suspected.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Needs refinement. Some find it helpful, while others don’t notice benefits yet.

sphere_commentary.overview:
Systematic review of the Drum Protocols dataset reveals strong efficacy signals across HEALING and THRIVING series, with TRANSFORMING protocols showing expected variability due to ascending-arc design. Most protocols exhibit meaningful signals with n≥20, supporting iterative development priorities.
• HEALING protocols dominate in response volume and consistency, driven by H-OS-L1 and H-AX-L1.
• THRIVING shows high mean scores but requires nuanced approach due to holder protocol variability.
• YouTube engagement remains limited but suggests undiscovered protocols like T-CF-L3 warrant promotion.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Series performance aligns with core design intent, with distinct listener response patterns.
• HEALING: Consistent efficacy across anxiety, sleep, and overstimulation, highest confidence tiers.
• THRIVING: High mean scores with T-FC-L3 leading, some protocol variability in focus outcomes.
• TRANSFORMING: Wider outcome spreads consistent with low-affect targets, development signals needed.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Key outliers identified for prioritized investigation.
• X-MC-L3: Low mean score (5.7) with n=10 suggests potential mismatch or subgroup effect [CONVERGENT].
• T-MB-L2: High variance (std=2.03) may indicate polarization [SINGLE SOURCE].
• X-MD-L2: Low positive response rate (43%) warrants routing review [SINGLE SOURCE].
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
Actionable signals for protocol refinement and discovery.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] H-SL-L3: Adjust Adviser routing for insomniacs based on 'did NOT settle' qualitative reports.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] X-MC-L3: Investigate population split via post-listening surveys.
• T-CF-L2: Prioritize YouTube analytics for retention signal validation.
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding drift and clustering insights inform analytical stability.
• Notable drift in X-ME-L1 and T-CF-L1 suggests evolving understanding of engagement patterns.
• Strong semantic clustering between T-FC-L2 and T-CF-L1 validates design coherence.
• Low embedding confidence due to single-volume dominance.
